name: ccaas-foundry-w365a-runner
description: Foundry + Windows 365 for Agents runner for the CCaaS Demo App: captures the CCaaS outcome from the handoff folder, checks out a Windows 365 for Agents Cloud PC via the session-lifecycle API, drives the legacy claims app with the Azure AI Foundry Computer Use loop, and relays ready/result/error back to the CCaaS Agent Desktop.
